mapper.select: select count(*) from DEPLOY_HISTORY dh inner join LEARNING_MODEL lm on dh.MODEL_ID = lm.ID left join HC_MEMBER hm on dh.EXEC_ID = hm.MEM_ID where

select
from DEPLOY_HISTORY dh inner join LEARNING_MODEL lm on dh.MODEL_ID = lm.ID left join HC_MEMBER hm on dh.EXEC_ID = hm.MEM_ID where
order by dh.EXEC_DT
ASC
DESC
mapper.sql: dh.ID, dh.MODEL_ID, dh.EXEC_ID, dh.EXEC_DT, dh.RESULT, lm.LEARN_NAME, lm.HDQR_BOB_DCD, lm.LEARNING_TYPE, COALESCE(hm.MEM_NAME, dh.EXEC_ID) as execName
